mapper.select: SELECT base.quiz_id AS quizId, base.quiz_title AS quizTitle, base.description AS description, base.image_url AS imageUrl, base.total_questions AS totalQuestions, base.solved_questions AS solvedQuestions, CASE WHEN base.is_visited = 0 THEN 'LOCKED' WHEN base.solved_questions = base.total_questions THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN base.solved_questions > 0 THEN 'PROGRESS' ELSE 'AVAILABLE' END AS quizStatus FROM ( SELECT pqi.place_quiz_info_id AS quiz_id, pqi.title AS quiz_title, pqi.description AS description, p.first_image AS image_url, COUNT(DISTINCT pq.quiz_id) AS total_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT mqr.quiz_id) AS solved_questions, MAX(CASE WHEN v.visit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_visited FROM member m JOIN place_quiz_info pqi ON pqi.difficulty = m.difficulty AND pqi.is_active = TRUE JOIN place p ON p.place_id = pqi.place_id AND p.is_active = TRUE JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.place_quiz_info_id = pqi.place_quiz_info_id JOIN quiz q ON q.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id AND q.is_active = TRUE LEFT JOIN visit v ON v.member_id = m.member_id AND v.place_id = p.place_id LEFT JOIN member_quiz_response mqr ON mqr.member_id = m.member_id AND mqr.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY pqi.place_quiz_info_id, pqi.title, pqi.description, p.first_image ) base ORDER BY quizStatus

SELECT pqi.place_quiz_info_id AS quiz_id, p.place_id AS place_id, p.first_image AS image_url, pqi.title AS title, pqi.description AS description, stats.correct_questions AS correct_questions, CASE WHEN stats.is_visited = 0 THEN 'LOCKED' WHEN stats.solved_questions = stats.total_questions THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN stats.solved_questions > 0 THEN 'PROGRESS' ELSE 'AVAILABLE' END AS quiz_status, stats.last_question_index AS last_question_index, q.quiz_id AS question_quiz_id, q.question AS question_text, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM member_quiz_response mqr WHERE mqr.member_id = #{memberId} AND mqr.quiz_id = q.quiz_id ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS question_is_solved, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM member_quiz_response mqr WHERE mqr.member_id = #{memberId} AND mqr.quiz_id = q.quiz_id AND mqr.is_correct = TRUE ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS question_is_correct, qa.answer_id AS option_answer_id, qa.content AS option_content FROM member m JOIN place_quiz_info pqi ON pqi.place_quiz_info_id = #{quizId} AND pqi.difficulty = m.difficulty AND pqi.is_active = TRUE JOIN place p ON p.place_id = pqi.place_id AND p.is_active = TRUE JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.place_quiz_info_id = pqi.place_quiz_info_id JOIN quiz q ON q.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id AND q.is_active = TRUE JOIN quiz_answer qa ON qa.quiz_id = q.quiz_id JOIN ( SELECT pqi.place_quiz_info_id, COUNT(DISTINCT pq.quiz_id) AS total_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT mqr.quiz_id) AS solved_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mqr.is_correct = TRUE THEN mqr.quiz_id END) AS correct_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT mqr.quiz_id) AS last_question_index, MAX(CASE WHEN v.visit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_visited FROM member m JOIN place_quiz_info pqi ON pqi.place_quiz_info_id = #{quizId} AND pqi.difficulty = m.difficulty AND pqi.is_active = TRUE JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.place_quiz_info_id = pqi.place_quiz_info_id JOIN quiz q ON q.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id AND q.is_active = TRUE LEFT JOIN member_quiz_response mqr ON mqr.member_id = #{memberId} AND mqr.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id LEFT JOIN visit v ON v.member_id = m.member_id AND v.place_id = pqi.place_id WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY pqi.place_quiz_info_id ) stats ON stats.place_quiz_info_id = pqi.place_quiz_info_id WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY q.quiz_id, qa.answer_id
mapper.delete: DELETE mqr FROM member_quiz_response mqr JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.quiz_id = mqr.quiz_id JOIN place_quiz_info pqi ON pqi.place_quiz_info_id = pq.place_quiz_info_id JOIN member m ON m.member_id = mqr.member_id AND m.difficulty = pqi.difficulty WHERE mqr.member_id = #{memberId} AND pqi.place_quiz_info_id = #{quizId}
mapper.select: SELECT qa.is_correct AS isCorrect, ( SELECT MAX(correct_qa.answer_id) FROM quiz_answer correct_qa WHERE correct_qa.quiz_id = q.quiz_id AND correct_qa.is_correct = TRUE ) AS correctAnswerId, CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM place_quiz next_pq JOIN quiz next_q ON next_q.quiz_id = next_pq.quiz_id AND next_q.is_active = TRUE WHERE next_pq.place_quiz_info_id = pqi.place_quiz_info_id AND next_q.quiz_id > q.quiz_id ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isLastQuestion FROM member m JOIN place_quiz_info pqi ON pqi.place_quiz_info_id = #{quizId} AND pqi.difficulty = m.difficulty AND pqi.is_active = TRUE JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.place_quiz_info_id = pqi.place_quiz_info_id JOIN quiz q ON q.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id AND q.quiz_id = #{questionId} AND q.is_active = TRUE JOIN quiz_answer qa ON qa.quiz_id = q.quiz_id AND qa.answer_id = #{selectedOptionId} WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_quiz_response (member_id, quiz_id, answer_id, is_correct) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{questionId}, #{selectedOptionId}, #{isCorrect})
mapper.select: SELECT pqi.place_quiz_info_id AS quiz_id, stats.total_questions AS total_questions, stats.correct_questions AS correct_questions, q.quiz_id AS question_id, CASE WHEN mqr.is_correct = TRUE THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_correct, mqr.answer_id AS user_selected_id, correct_qa.answer_id AS correct_option_id FROM member m JOIN place_quiz_info pqi ON pqi.place_quiz_info_id = #{quizId} AND pqi.difficulty = m.difficulty AND pqi.is_active = TRUE JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.place_quiz_info_id = pqi.place_quiz_info_id JOIN quiz q ON q.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id AND q.is_active = TRUE LEFT JOIN member_quiz_response mqr ON mqr.member_id = m.member_id AND mqr.quiz_id = q.quiz_id LEFT JOIN quiz_answer correct_qa ON correct_qa.quiz_id = q.quiz_id AND correct_qa.is_correct = TRUE JOIN ( SELECT pqi.place_quiz_info_id, COUNT(DISTINCT pq.quiz_id) AS total_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mqr.is_correct = TRUE THEN mqr.quiz_id END) AS correct_questions FROM member m JOIN place_quiz_info pqi ON pqi.place_quiz_info_id = #{quizId} AND pqi.difficulty = m.difficulty AND pqi.is_active = TRUE JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.place_quiz_info_id = pqi.place_quiz_info_id JOIN quiz q ON q.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id AND q.is_active = TRUE LEFT JOIN member_quiz_response mqr ON mqr.member_id = m.member_id AND mqr.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY pqi.place_quiz_info_id ) stats ON stats.place_quiz_info_id = pqi.place_quiz_info_id WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY q.quiz_id
